title: Clientside Teams
description: Team chat fully client-sided without needing server install any plugin or mod
body:
# Client-Side Teams Chat

Basic mod adding a few client-side commands to send whispers (/tell) to all your teammates at once without needing to manually send messages to each player.

`/cteam [text]` - send message to team.

`/cteamadd [username]` - adds player to team (trusted players).

`/cteamremove [username]` - removes player from team (trusted players).

`/cteamlist` - lists UUID of all members of the team (trusted players).

# Why would you ever need this mod?

Basically some servers might not have team plugin/mod making it not possible to quickly send messages to whole team so this mod comes in our place and sends messages for us to each of our teammate in less than second plus doesn't flood chat

# Do other players need the mod installed?

No. The only time they would need this mod is to also quickly send messages and see correct formatting; make sure to add each other to the team (trusted players list).
